name: Post-shift learning review
description: Short review template for repeated issues, what actually happened, what changes next, and who owns the follow-up before the next service cycle begins.
source_ref: core-v2: learning loops need a short, repeatable review surface tied to action
usage_moment: Use after service when repeated or high-cost breakdowns deserve same-day learning closure.
expected_output: A concise review with issue, cause hypothesis, next change, and named owner.
